specialtyCoffeeBar.title: Business Takeover - Specialty Coffee Bar (Ari District)

propertyDetails.text: Fully equipped and ready to open

description.heading: Minimalist style coffee shop takeover with complete equipment, prime location in Ari
description.body: Opportunity to own a Specialty Coffee shop in one of Bangkok's most bustling areas. The shop is decorated in a minimalist and warm style, ready to continue operations immediately. High-end equipment included, such as La Marzocco Linea PB 2 Groups espresso machine, Mahlkönig coffee grinder, cake display fridge, and complete furniture. The shop has a regular customer base and stable sales. Located in a soi surrounded by offices and condos, easy travel near BTS Ari.

inclusions: Lease rights and customer base
All coffee brewing and bakery equipment
Drink recipes and supplier contacts
Trained staff (if desired)

aiSummary.description: This location is highly suitable for F&B businesses due to being in the Ari area with high purchasing power.

broker.name: Kittiphat S.
broker.expertise: Specialises in closing cafe and restaurant deals in the Ari district.

analysisCards.suggestion: Office location suitable for lunch sales, people have purchasing power, can use items from the old business.
Office location, few competitors, near a university, can use items from the old business.

transport.text: 200 m. (3 mins) from BTS Phrom Phong

description.heading: Family-friendly Shabu restaurant with full kitchen and ventilation system on Sukhumvit Soi 39
description.body: A well-established Shabu-Shabu restaurant located on one of Sukhumvit's busiest sois. The space features a complete commercial kitchen with 15 induction cooktop stations, industrial-grade exhaust and ventilation systems, and a walk-in freezer. The interior is decorated in a warm Japanese-inspired style with booth seating and private family rooms. Loyal customer base built over 5 years of continuous operation. Surrounded by condominiums, serviced apartments, and Japanese expat community.

inclusions: Lease rights and existing customer base
All kitchen equipment and induction cooktops
Supplier contacts and recipes
Trained kitchen and service staff (if desired)

aiSummary.description: This location is highly suitable for F&B dining businesses due to the Japanese expat community and high foot traffic near BTS Phrom Phong.

broker.name: Natthapong W.
broker.expertise: Specialises in restaurant and dining space deals in the Sukhumvit area.

analysisCards.suggestion: Japanese expat neighborhood with high demand for hot pot dining. Existing ventilation supports this perfectly.
Strong Japanese community nearby. Could convert to evening izakaya concept with minimal changes.

transport.text: 400 m. (6 mins) from BTS Thong Lo

propertyDetails.text: Fully licensed and ready to open

description.heading: Premium coffee shop in Thonglor with established brand and loyal customer base
description.body: Take over a thriving premium coffee shop in the heart of Thonglor, Bangkok's trendiest neighborhood. The space features a modern industrial-chic interior with imported Italian espresso machines, a full bakery kitchen, and Instagram-worthy decor. The shop has built a strong social media presence with over 15,000 followers. Located on a high-visibility corner with excellent walk-in traffic from nearby luxury condominiums and creative offices.

inclusions: Lease rights and brand name transfer
All coffee and bakery equipment
Social media accounts (15K+ followers)
Trained barista staff (if desired)

aiSummary.description: Premium location in Thonglor with high purchasing power demographic. Ideal for upscale F&B and lifestyle businesses.

broker.name: Pimchanok T.
broker.expertise: Specialises in lifestyle cafe and boutique space deals in the Thonglor-Ekkamai area.

analysisCards.suggestion: Thonglor demographic loves brunch culture. Existing equipment and brand are perfectly suited.
Evening economy is strong in Thonglor. Could add wine bar concept to complement daytime cafe.

mkSiamSquare.title: Business Takeover - MK Thai Hot Pot (Siam Square)

propertyDetails.text: Full kitchen setup ready to operate

description.heading: Thai hot pot restaurant in the heart of Siam Square, surrounded by students and shoppers
description.body: A prime opportunity to take over a Thai-style hot pot restaurant in Siam Square, one of Bangkok's most iconic shopping and entertainment districts. The space is located on the 2nd floor with high visibility from the main walkway. Fully equipped kitchen with 12 hot pot stations, industrial ventilation, and a cold storage room. The location benefits from massive foot traffic from Chulalongkorn University students, Siam Paragon shoppers, and tourists. Affordable takeover price makes this ideal for first-time business owners.

inclusions: Lease rights in Siam Square
All kitchen equipment and hot pot stations
Existing supplier network
Trained staff (if desired)

aiSummary.description: Prime location near BTS Siam with massive student and tourist foot traffic. Ideal for affordable dining concepts.

broker.name: Thanawat R.
broker.expertise: Specialises in student-zone and high-traffic dining space deals near Siam and Chula.

analysisCards.suggestion: Massive student population from Chulalongkorn. Affordable hot pot buffet concept would thrive here.
High foot traffic area ideal for fast casual dining. Quick turnaround attracts lunch rush crowds.

clothingSamYan.title: Business Takeover - Boutique Clothing Store (Sam Yan)

transport.text: 250 m. (4 mins) from MRT Sam Yan

propertyDetails.text: Retail fixtures and display lighting ready

description.heading: Fashion boutique in Sam Yan with strong student, office, and mall foot traffic
description.body: Take over a modern clothing store near Samyan Mitrtown and Chulalongkorn University. The shop is designed for fashion retail with clean display walls, stainless clothing racks, full-length mirrors, fitting rooms, and a compact stock room. The location benefits from daily foot traffic from students, office workers, condo residents, and weekend shoppers moving between MRT Sam Yan, Samyan Mitrtown, and Chula. Suitable for apparel, lifestyle accessories, sneaker drops, or an online-to-offline fashion brand.

inclusions: Lease rights near Samyan Mitrtown
Clothing racks, display shelves, and mirrors
POS counter and stock room fixtures
Supplier contacts and social media handover

aiSummary.description: Sam Yan has strong student, office, and mall traffic. The space is well suited for apparel, accessories, and lifestyle retail.

broker.name: Narin C.
broker.expertise: Specialises in fashion retail and lifestyle store takeovers around Sam Yan, Chula, and Pathum Wan.

analysisCards.suggestion: Student and office traffic around Sam Yan supports trend-led fashion and accessory retail with frequent product rotations.
The location can support a mixed retail model combining apparel, gifts, accessories, and online pickup.

clinicSiam.title: Business Takeover - Aesthetic Clinic (Siam Square One)
clinicSiam.location: Siam Square One, Pathum Wan, Bangkok

propertyDetails.text: Treatment rooms and reception area ready

description.heading: Aesthetic clinic space in Siam Square One with direct access to BTS Siam and premium shopper traffic
description.body: A ready-to-operate clinic takeover in Siam Square One, one of Bangkok's strongest beauty, wellness, and lifestyle destinations. The space includes a bright reception lobby, consultation area, three treatment rooms, clean storage, and customer waiting seats. Positioned for high visibility among university students, office workers, tourists, and premium shoppers from Siam Paragon, Siam Center, and Siam Square. Ideal for aesthetic treatments, dermatology consultation, wellness services, or a premium beauty clinic brand.

inclusions: Lease rights in Siam Square One
Reception counter and waiting area furniture
Treatment beds, partitions, and clinic storage
Existing customer inquiry channels and supplier contacts

aiSummary.description: Siam Square One offers excellent visibility for beauty and wellness services, with strong access from BTS Siam and premium mall traffic.

broker.name: Siriporn L.
broker.expertise: Specialises in clinic, wellness, and beauty retail spaces in Siam, Chidlom, and central Bangkok malls.

analysisCards.suggestion: Siam Square One draws beauty-focused customers and tourists. Existing treatment rooms reduce setup time.
The mall location supports appointment-based services such as facials, skincare consultation, and wellness programs.

coffee2.title: Business Takeover - Garden Coffee Studio (Charoen Krung)

transport.text: 500 m. (7 mins) from BTS Saphan Taksin

propertyDetails.text: Coffee bar, seating, and display counter ready

description.heading: Character coffee studio in Charoen Krung with gallery traffic and weekend visitors
description.body: A ready-to-operate cafe takeover on Charoen Krung, positioned between creative studios, boutique hotels, galleries, and riverside tourist routes. The shop has a warm garden-inspired storefront, compact espresso bar, bakery display, flexible seating, and a small prep area. It is suitable for specialty coffee, slow bar, brunch, dessert, or a creative cafe concept that can host pop-ups and weekend events. The neighborhood attracts office workers on weekdays and strong lifestyle traffic on weekends.

inclusions: Lease rights in Charoen Krung
Coffee counter, display shelves, and seating
Basic brewing equipment and supplier contacts
Brand handover support for first month

aiSummary.description: Charoen Krung is strong for creative cafe concepts, tourist visits, gallery traffic, and weekend lifestyle spending.

broker.name: Krit T.
broker.expertise: Specialises in cafe and creative retail takeovers around Charoen Krung, Talat Noi, and Bang Rak.

analysisCards.suggestion: Creative neighborhood traffic supports premium coffee, seasonal drinks, and weekend pop-up collaborations.
The area works well for a hybrid cafe and mini gallery concept with rotating local artist displays.

milk-tea.title: Business Takeover - Milk Tea Kiosk (Victory Monument)

transport.text: 180 m. (3 mins) from BTS Victory Monument

propertyDetails.text: Drink counter and cold storage ready

description.heading: Compact milk tea kiosk near Victory Monument with strong commuter and student traffic
description.body: A small-format beverage shop takeover designed for fast service and high daily turnover. Located near Victory Monument, the kiosk benefits from BTS commuters, van terminal traffic, nearby offices, tutorial schools, hospitals, and students moving through the area throughout the day. The setup includes a service counter, tea brewing station, sealing machine space, under-counter fridge, menu lightbox, and storage shelves. Ideal for milk tea, fruit tea, matcha, coffee-to-go, or a dessert drink brand.

inclusions: Lease rights near Victory Monument
Drink counter, menu lightbox, and storage shelves
Cold storage, sealing station space, and basic fixtures
Recipe sheet and supplier contact handover

aiSummary.description: Victory Monument is well suited for quick-service drinks because of constant commuter, student, hospital, and office traffic.

broker.name: Ploy W.
broker.expertise: Specialises in kiosk, beverage, and small-format retail spaces around transit hubs in Bangkok.

analysisCards.suggestion: Transit traffic and student demand make the kiosk suitable for fast-moving milk tea and fruit tea menus.
Small footprint and low staffing work well for bottled tea, matcha, coffee-to-go, and dessert drinks.
